meaning: pron.[they 的宾格] 他们,她们,它们
examples: I will explain to them that I can't pay them.
He would barge into them and kick them in the shins.
The cabs cut in front of them, trying to box them in.
In the tour we show them proudly the way the people in Kibera live.
It's also those who are behind the killers, those complicit with them, who are punishable.
